mustPass: Selected work appears within the first scroll on the home page.
Hero copy reads as the studio's voice, not a generic 'We help brands grow'.
At least one capability discipline (Brand identity, Web design, Motion, etc.) is named.
At least one client or project is named on the home page (text-only roster is fine).
Manifesto block contains a non-generic statement of the studio's point of view.
All routes from routes.json are present.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Stock photography of 'team brainstorming with sticky notes' or generic Slack-screenshots.
Generic 'We are a passionate team that loves design' filler — the manifesto must say something specific.
Hiding the work catalogue behind a click — selected work must be visible without navigation on the home page.
Service-list copy that reads like an LSB ('We offer logo design from 2,500 SEK') — agencies sell on point of view, not unit pricing.
Forms or contact paths that fail at build because of missing third-party env vars.
